notes: v1.14.105 - Work redesign: card-grid landing + drill-in (mirrors the Ref redesign). Entering Work via the bottom nav now shows a 4-card corner-bracket grid (Deploy/Scan/Handoff/Issues) instead of the flat tab strip - the premium glassy .rf-card visuals are reused. Cards route via the existing showWorkTab('deploy'|'scan'|'handoff'|'issues'); showMode('work') adds #pg-work.wk-grid (grid view), showWorkTab removes it to drill into the existing wk-* panel (Scan content / Issues log / Deploy+Handoff launchers all intact) + sets the back title. New wk_showGrid() back affordance (#work-back) + wk_setBackTitle. Command-Center launcher + NBA deep-links (cmd_route('work',target)) drill straight to the panel. No Ref duplication, no extra nesting - just the existing 4 Work surfaces as cards. body.rd-gated; tab strip hidden under body.rd; panel contents unedited; legacy byte-identical.
